title: LAWNGTLAI DCF (Wildlife) OFFICE KAWTAH DAN PHAL LOH THIL MANTE HALRAL A NI
content:
4690/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 3rd March 2026:Vawiin khan District Conservator of Forest (Wildlife) Chhimtuipui Wildlife Division Office kawtzawlah dan phalloh thil man chi hrang hrangte hal ral a ni.

Chief Judicial Magistrate (CJM) thupek angin dan phal loh thil man chi hrang hrangte hi hal ral a ni a. He hunah Chief Wildlife  Warden, Lawngtlai District, Mizoram Journalist Association, Lawngtlai leh NGO - te an tel a ni. Thil man hal ralte hi a hnuaiah tarlan a ni e.

title: “One day training programme of DDO on TDS matter” hmang
content:
4689/2025-2026

Aizawl the 3rd March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Taxation Department chuan CGST Aizawl Commissionerate nen a tangkawpin, Taxation Auditorium ah “One day training programme of DDO on TDS matter” an hmang a. He training-ah hian Pu HK Lalhawngliana, Commissioner of State Tax leh Pu Malsawmtluanga IRS, Jt. Commissioner, CGST Aizawl, ten thu an sawi a. Vawiin programme hi sorkar sum luangral tur venna atana pawimawh leh tangkai tak a nih thu leh DDO te pawh an theihtawpa sorkar tana thahnemngai taka lo thawk chhunzawm zel turin Pu HK Lalhawngliana, Commissioner of State Tax chuan DDO kalkhawmte a chah a. Pu Lalruatpuia, Dy. Commissioner of State Tax leh Pi Lalhriatpuii, Asst. Commissioner of State Tax ten training hi an pe a ni. DDO ten TDS chungchang a zawhna an neih hrang hrang te zawtin, hlawk takin hun an hmang. Training ah hian Department hrang hrang atangin DDO/representative 61 an tel a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP IN  FOOD, CIVIL SUPPLY & CONSUMERS AFFAIRS DEPARTMENT GO-DOWN, AOC VENG LAWNGTLAI A TLAWH
content:
4687/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 3rd March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Food, Civil Supply & Consumers Affairs Department Go-Down, AOC veng Lawngtlai a mi a tlawh.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan mipuiin an chanvo diktak an hmuh theih nan Buk diktaka Buhfai pekchhuah chu thawktuten an tihmakmawh a ni tih sawiin, helam hawia Lawngtlai Go-Down ah kalpui a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, engti kawng mahin Mipui chanai chu lakhek emaw tihchingpen a remlo tih hrereng chunga an hna thawk turin a chah.

Bawrhsap hi Supply Go-Down a thawktuten lo dawngsawngin, Buhfai lakluh leh pekchhuah reng reng chi Digital Weighing Scale hmanga buk vek a nih vangin, Buk diklo a Buhfai lakluh leh pekchhuah a awmlo tih an sawi a, bukna dik hman chu Retailer te pawn tha an tiin Buk diktaka Buhfai an lachhuak chu an lawm viau thin tih thawktute chuan an sawi.

Bawrhsap chu Supply Go-Down lama thuneitute chuan Lawngtlai District a bikin Fur ruahtui tlakllaia kalpawh harsatna Centre 6, Diltlang South, Bungtlang South, Tuithumhnar, Vathuampui, Vaseikai leh Dapdep Centre ah te Fur chhunga an eitur Buhfai chhekkhawl hna thawhmek a nih thu an hrilh a, kumdanga an lo tih thin angin kumin ah pawh Thal laiin heng Centre parukah te hian Fur ruahtui tlaklaia Buhfai a harsatna a awmloh nan Buhfai chhekkhawl hman vek an tum thu an sawi.

Bawrhsap hi Pu Lalrindika SDC Lawngtlai leh Chanchinthar thehdarhtu  ten  an tawiawm a ni.

title: SIAHAAH SAWRKAR LIRTHEI KHALHTUTE TAN NI KHAT AWH ROAD SAFETY AWARENESS NEIH A NI
content:
4686/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 3, March 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dár 2:00PM khân DRDO Conference Hall, DC Complex, Siahaah Sawrkar lirthei khalhtute tán road safety awareness programme neih a ni a, Dr. Manesia Khaimeichho, District Transport Officer, Siaha District, Siaha chuan he hun hi a kaihruai a, kumin road safety awareness thupui chu Sadak Suraksha A-Jeevan Raksha (Road Safety - Life Safety) tih a ni.

Dr. Manesia Khaimeichho, DTO chuan hun hlu tak senga kal khawmte chu lawmthu hrilhin, sawrkar lirthei khalhtute chu sawrkar hnathawk an nih angin sawrkar dan zam (rules) kalh zawngin sawrkar lirthei khalh lo turin a chah.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Enforcement Inspector Pu MS Dawngliana, Traffic OC Pu A. Lalthianghlima leh MADC-a Assistant MVI B. Sawma ten traffic dan leh dun chungchanga hriattur pawimawh hrang hrang zirtirna an nei a, kalkhawmte zawhna an chhang nghal bawk.

Sawm bikte thusawi tlangpui chu:-

i. Lirthei ṭha khalh avang leh kawng lo ṭha chho zelah hian chak tak taka tlan hi a him lo, a chhunga chuangte ngaihven reng tur a ni.

ii. Lirthei khalhtuten lirthei an khalh laia an mizia hian pi leh pute zahawmna thui tak a hril tih hriat a ṭha.

iii. Lirthei dang leh kea kal mihringte inzah tawn tur.

iv. In leh lo a changkan ang zelin lirthei kan khalh laia kan mizia hi tih changkang ve zel tur.

v. Kawng a zim a, lirthei a pung zel bawk si a, duhna lai laiah lirthei dah (park) loh tur, sawrkar lirthei phei chu hetiang hmuna dah hi a inhmeh lo lehzual.

vi. Tlangrama cheng kan nih avangin chhuk leh chho a tam a, chho zawnga tlante ngaihchan thiam ni se.

vii. Hmanlai huna lirthei khalh phalna license nei zawng zawng smart card tir vek tur a ni.

viii. Mahni license neihna lirthei chiah khalh tur.

ix. Thinrim chunga lirthei khalh loh tur. Hahdam leh harhvang takin khalh ṭhin tur a ni a. Hrisel lohna leh nawmsam lohna neih chuan pi leh pute hrilh hreh loh tur.

x. In sa thar reng rengin lirthei dahna siam tel nachang hriat a ṭha.

xi. Lirthei khalhtu kan nih chuan mihring himna hi ngaih pawimawh ber tur.

xii. Siaha district chhunga lirthei chetsualna thleng zawng zawng zaa sawmriat (80%) chu a khalhtuin ruih a neih ṭhin vang a ni.

xiii. Lirthei chak tak taka tlan ṭhinte leh mipui harsatna thlen ṭhinte tan e-challan hman tum a ni a. Thil sual ti an awma lirthei number chhinchhiah hman anih chuan e-challan hmangin hma lak tum a ni a, an leiba an tlak hma chuan khawlin a chhinchhiah reng tawh dawn. E-challan hian state dang lirthei pawh a huam vek dawn a, lirthei lei leh hralh chungchangah pawh fimkhur lehzual a ṭha.

District Transport Officer Office Siaha buatsaih vawiin hun hmannaah hian  Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia department hrang hrang lirthei khalhtute leh MADC hnuaia department lirthei khalhtute an tel a, Pu Vabeibikhu Hlychho, DTO Staff Siaha-in lawmthu sawina a nei a, hun hman tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

title: GOVERNMENT SAIHA COLLEGE ZIRLAI TE TAN ROAD SAFETY AWARENESS PROGRAMME-HMAN A NI
content:
4685/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the March 3, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 A.M. khan Government Saiha College Seminar Hall, College Vaih Siaha-ah Road Safety Awareness programme hman a ni a, Dr. Manesia Khaimeichho, District Transport Officer, Siaha District, Siaha chuan he hun hi a kaihruai.

Dr. Manesia Khaimeichho, DTO chuan Government Saiha College-a zirlaite leh official kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a, thusawi an ngaithlakte chu mahni vengah ṭheuh pu darhtu ni turin a sawm nghal bawk. DTO tarlan danin Siaha District-a lirthei khalhtute man annih nachhan ber chu lirthei document thi leh lirthei khalh phalna (license) nei lo a ni, a ti. Zirlai kal khawmte chu an hmalam hun atana an inbuatsaihnaah ruihhlo tichhin lo tur leh, rui chung phei chuan lirthei khalh miah lo tura chahin, rui chunga lirthei khalhte man annih chuan khawl (sytem) ah chhinchhiah vek anih avangin an zir zawha hna an zawn hunah harsatna an tawh a hlauh thu a sawi.

Vawiina hun hmannaah hian MVI Pu K. Vanlalrema, Traffic OC Pu A. Lalthianghlima leh MADC-a Assistant MVI B. Sawma ten traffic dan leh dun chungchanga hriattur pawimawh hrang hrang zirtirna an nei a, zirlaite zawhna an chhang nghal bawk.

District Transport Officer Office Siaha buatsaih vawiin hun hmannaah hian Government Saiha College-a zirlaite leh official an tel a, Dr. Manesia Khaimeichho, DTO chuan lawmthu sawina a nei a, hun hman tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

4684/2025-2026

Aizawl the 3rd March, 2026 :SP Traffic, Aizawl chuan Vaivakawn Traffic Point atanga Kanan Veng Presbyterian Church, Middle Kanan inkar kawngah Ace Alliance Pvt. Ltd. ten tuichhe paihna pipe phum hna an thawh dawn avangin 3.3.2026 atanga hna thawh zawh hma chuan zan tin dar 9 atanga zing dar 5 thleng khar thin a nih tur thu a chhuah.

title: VICE PRESIDENT LOKAL TUR CHUNGCHANGA AMC THUCHHUAH
content:
4681/2025-2026

Aizawl the 3rd March, 2026 :Ni 07.03.2026 (Inrinni) hian Hon’ble Vice President of India in MizoramUniversity a tlawh dawn avangin heng a hnuaia hmun tarlanah te hian kawng sira chawhmeh zuar thin te chawhma dar 11:00 AM hma lamah thut loh tur a ni e:

Hemi ni ah hian Lok Bhavan atanga Mizoram University inkara kawngpuisirah thil zawrh iai leh mimal bungrua Io dah hnawk Io turin kan inhriattir bawk a, a paltlang Local Council ten mahni veng chhung theuh Io en tel tur a'ni e.

title: SAITUALAH CHAPCHAR KUT 2026 LAWM DAN TUR REL
content:
4679/2025-2026

Saitual 3rd March, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin Saitual District-a Chapchar Kut 2026 lawm dan tur rel a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian February ni 23, 2026- a Chapchar Kut hman dan tur an rel te thlir letna hun hman a ni a, Pu Lalnunpuia, Secretary, Chapchar Kut 2026 Organising Committee kaihhruaiin kalkhawmte mawhphurhna leh chanvo hrang hrang te sawiho a ni bawk.

Saitual District-a Chapchar Kut hmanna pui ber chu March ni 13, chawhma dar 11-ah Saitual Vantlang Khelmual (Saitual Public Playground)-ah hman rel a ni a, Kut Pa atan Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister of State beisei niin, Kut Thlengtu atan District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi beisei a ni bawk. Chapchar Kut thupui atan Zonun Zemawi Inremna ni se tih rel a ni.

Chapchar Kut 2026 hman dan tur relnaah hian Office hrang hrang hotute, Town Area a VCP te, Sub Hqrs YMA , Sub Hqrs MHIP & District MUP aiawh bakah Town Area a Branch YMA aiawh leh thuthar thehdarhtu te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Kawlkulhah M-PACS hawn a ni
content:
4678/2025-2026

Khawzawl, dated 3rd March 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11 khan Kawlkulh Centenary Hall-ah Multipurpose Primary Agricultural Credit Society (M-PACS) hawnna hun neih a ni a, Pu Lalmalsawma, Joint Registrar Cooperation Department chu khuallian niin, Pu B. Lalchhanhima, DCO, Khawzawl chuan a kaihruai.

He hunah hian Pu B. Lalchhanhima, Chairman chuan kalkhawmte inhmelhriattirna leh inlawmna thu a sawi a. Pu Lianchhuma, Vice Chairman, Kawlkulh M-PACS Ltd. in hunserh hmangin, Pu C. Lalnunzira, Secretary, Kawlkulh, M-PACS Ltd. atangin Society report ngaihthlak a ni.

Khuallian, Pu Lalmalsawma chuan Kawlkulh khuaa M-PACS hawn theih a ni chu lawmawm a tih hle thu a sawi a. M-PACS awmzia leh khawtlang mipuite tana a tangkaina te bakah mipuiten awlsam zawka loan an lak theih dan te sawi fiahin, hemi atan hian mipuite pawhin mawhphurhna sang tak an neih thu a sawi a. Society hlawkna ai maha mipuiten tlawm zawka mamawh leh thil tha an lo hmuh ve theih nan te leh retheihna umbo nana hmanraw pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. Thahnem ngai taka thawkho a tangrual tura sawmin, Memberte an lo pun zel theih nan thalaite pawhin awareness uar taka nei zel turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

He hunah hian Kawlkulh khaw chhunga NGO hrang hrang hruaitute pawh telin Pu Lalnithanga, Chairman, Kawlkulh M-PACS Ltd. in thilpek hlanna leh lawmthu sawina hun neiin hun tihtawp nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah chawlhkar hnih awh tur Chapchar Kut Exhibition (State Handloom Expo Hathkargha Mela) hawn a ni
content:
4677/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 3:National Handloom Development Programme (NHDP) hnuaia Mizoram Handloom & Handicrafts Development Corporation Limited (ZOHANDCO) leh Development Commissioner (Handloom), Ministry of Textiles, Govt of India ṭang kawp huaihawt chawlhkar hnih awh tur, Chapchar Kut Exhibition — State Handloom Expo Hathkargha Mela chu vawiin khan Lungleia Saikuti Hall-ah ZOHANDCO Chairman Pu JK Dawngzuala'n a hawng.

Khuallian, ZOHANDCO Chairman Pu JK Dawngzuala chuan tun ṭuma exhibition buatsaih hi Lunglei tan liau liauva a hranpaa dil chhuah a nih thu sawiin, a dilnaah Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n lehkha a ziahsak avanga an lawm thu a sawi a. ZOHANDCO hna ber chu kut themthiamte leh puan tahtute puih a nih thu sawiin, an kutchhuak siamna leh hralhnaah ZOHANDCO chuan hma lakpuiin, kawng a dapsak ṭhin tih a sawi a. Puan tahtute tan ZOHANDCO Office, Aizawlah Yarn Depot siam a nih thu leh man tlawm zawkin puan tahna tur lahlum pek chhuah ṭhin a nih thu sawiin, South Khawbung leh Thenzawlah te Yarn Depot hi dah belh tum a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoramah puan tah leh a kaihhnawiha ei zawng ṭhahnem tak an awm thu leh la chingtu aṭanga tah sa puan zuartu thlengin a huam tel tih sawiin, Mizorama sum veivak ṭhahnem tak an thawh thu leh a pun zel thu a sawi a. ZOHANDCO chuan Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah handloom training an pek ṭhin thu sawiin, kuminah khaw 20 chuang tuam theih beisei a nih thu a sawi a. Puan tahtute leh kut themthiam thil siamtute chu kutchhuak ṭha leh tlo (quality) ngai pawimawh turin a chah.

ZOHANDCO Chairman chuan mahni thar chhuah leh tih vete ngaihsan a ṭul tih sawiin, mahni hnam thil ngaihsan leh chawi lar chu ram leh hnam hmasawn nan a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Dik lohna a dik zawk emaw tih khawpa inthlahdah leh ngaihsam chu ram leh hnam tan a pawi tih sawiin, hnam dan leh ziarangte ngaih pawimawh a, zawm a ṭul thu a sawi a. Ram leh hnamin mawhphurhna la ngam mipa, nu nih ngam hmeichhia a mamawh tih sawiin, Mizo ṭhalaite chu intodelhna kawngah leh ei leh bara ram hmasawn nana mahni zawn ṭheuhva ṭan la turin a chah.

He huna Khual Zahawm, Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga chuan Mizote chu kut themthiam tak kan nih thu leh kan kutchhuakte a hman leh a hralhna lamah ṭan kan lak chuan hmasawnpui tur eizawnna tling a nih thu a sawi a. ZOHANDCO-in Lungleia Expo kal tlanga hma a lakna lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, chhim lama puan tahtu leh kut themthiamte tan nasa zawka hma lakpui turin a ngen a. ZOHANDCO-in hma hruai se, LMC-in theih tawpa lo thawhpui an inhuam thu a sawi a. Expo buatsaihna hmun Saikuti Hall chu LMC enkawlna hnuaiah chei ṭha tura hma lak a nih thu sawiin, sawrkarin a chei ṭhat nan State Priority Projects (SPP) hnuaiah cheng vaibelchhe 5 dahin, siam ṭhat thuai tum a ni tih a sawi.

Handloom Expo hawnnaah hian ZOHANDCO Manager Pu C. Lalrinmawia chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, BCM Bazar bialtu pastor, Rev. K. Lalbiakchhawna'n hunserh a hmang a. Lunglei District Additional Deputy Commissioner, Chapchar Kut Organising Chairman ni bawk Pi Zoramdini pawhin thu sawiin, Hathkargha Mela chu Chapchar Kut lawmna nen a inrem hle tih sawiin, Chapchar Kut nen kal kawpin buatsaih a ni tih a sawi a. Mi changkang apiangin mahni hnam thil leh hnam thuam an ngaisangin an chawi lar tih sawiin, puan tah leh thiamhnang deh chu intodelhna tur leh eizawnna ṭha tak a nih thu leh hmasawn zel theihna a nih thu a sawi a. A ti mite chuan uar deuhdeuh tur leh hmasawn zel tum turin a chah.

Handloom Expo hawnnaah hian Esther Hnamte leh Priskil Lalhmingsangi te zaiin, sawm bikte hnenah thilpek hlan a ni a. Handloom Expo Incharge Pu Vanlalmalsawma Sailo chuan lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Lungleia Chapchar Kut Exhibition — State Handloom Expo 2026 hawnnaah hian ZOHANDCO Board of Directors pathum — Pu Lalhmingthanga, Pu R. Rohnuna leh Pu F. Lalchungnunga te, LMC Executive Councillor leh Councillor te, sawrkar official-te, sawrkar official-te, tlawmngai pawl ai awh, political party ai awh, thu thar theh darhtu leh puan tahtu te an tel a. Hun hman zawh hian Khuallian, Khual Zahawm leh official-te chuan dawr (stall) hrang hrang an fang kual a, mipui tan dawr theihin hawn zui nghal a ni.

Saikuti Hall, Lungleia March ni 3–13 chhung awh tur Chapchar Kut Exhibition — State Handloom Expo 2026-ah hian puan dawr 60 hawn niin, he'ng dawrahte hian Mizoram hmun hrang hrang aṭangin tualchhuak puan leh thawmhnaw lam bakah, kut themthiam thil siamte man tlawm zawkin zawrh chhuah a ni a. Ei leh in zawrhna dawr 5 hawn tel a ni bawk a. ZOHANDCO leh Lunglei District Chapchar Kut Organising Committee chuan Chapchar Kut Exhibition hi chhim ṭheuh turin mipuite an sawm a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP IN LAIRAM RESCUE CENTRE A TLAWH
content:
4676/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 3rd March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 PM khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Ruihhlo ngaite enkawlna, Lairam Rescue Centre ( LRC) a hmunah kalin a tlawh.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlaia ruihhlo hluar chu mutmawh hnarmawha neih a ngai tih sawiin, Sorkar pawn theihtawp a chhuah thu leh Operation Jericho - kalpui mek chuan Lawngtlai District- a ruihhlo luttur a tiziaawm hle a ti. Lairam Rescue Centre - in ruihhlo ngaite enkawla chhanchhuah hna an thawk chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin, an hna tha taka hlenchhuak zel turin a fuih a. Ruihhlo ngai awm mekte pawh mahni insiamtharna hmuna nei a, khawtlang tana mi tangkai tak an la ni thei reng tih tarlangin, hma lam hunah Ruihhlo lakah fihlim theuh turin duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

LRC Superentendent Rev. Lianchhunga leh thawktu dang ten lo dawngsawngin, Centre dinhmun tlangpui Bawrhsap hian en in, Centre enkawltute chuan Bawrhsap hnenah an mamawh hrang hrang an thlen chu Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan theih ang anga lo bawhzui a tum thu a sawi a ni.

Lairam Rescue Centre hi Lairam Isua Krista Baptist Kohhran in kum 2021 a din a ni a, Lairam Rescue Centre hi Lawngtlai bul, Mampui kawng a awm niin, tun dinhmun ah mi - 15 enkawl mek an ni a, Superentendent hovin thawktu mi - 13 an awm mek a ni.

Bawrhsap hi Pu Lalrindika SDC leh MJA Lawngtlai ten an tawiawm a ni.

title: Governor Swears in Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte as State Information Commissioner
content:
533/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 3rd March, 2026:Mizoram Governor (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), administered the oath of office today to Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte, IAS (Retd.), appointing him as State Information Commissioner under the Mizoram State Information Commission (MSIC) at a ceremony in Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan.

During the swearing-in ceremony, Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena read out the appointment notification for Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte as State Information Commissioner. Governor (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh then administered the oath of office to Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte, formally inducting him into the role.

The swearing-in ceremony was attended by Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama, EF&CC Minister Pu Lalthansanga, Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata, IPRP&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova, and other dignitaries.

Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte hails from Tarpho village in Hnathial District. He holds a B.A. (Hons. in Education) from NEHU (1986), LL.B from NEHU (1993), M.A. (Public Administration) from HPU Shimla (2001), B.C.S from Serampore College (2007), D.Min from Serampore College (2018), and a Ph.D in Public Administration from MZU (2023). He joined the Mizoram Civil Service on May 30, 1991, and was promoted to the Indian Administrative Service (IAS) on December 3, 2019, in the AGMUT Cadre 2009.

After serving as Deputy Commissioner of Serchhip, he held Secretary positions in various Mizoram government departments. Following his promotion to Commissioner rank, he served as Commissioner & Secretary in the Excise & Narcotics Department and later in the Commerce & Industries Department before retiring on superannuation on August 31, 2025. During his career, he attended several prestigious DoPT-sponsored foreign training programmes. He currently resides with his wife and children at PWD Tlang, Ramhlun Venglai, Aizawl.

Attachment

title: Larsap-in State Information Commissioner atan Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte rinawmna thu tiam tirin a lalut
content:
4675/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 3rd March, 2026:Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte, IAS (Retd.) chu Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan-ah rinawmna thu tiam tirin Mizoram State Information Commission (MSIC) hnuaia State Information Commissioner atan a lalut.

Lakluhna inkhawmah hian Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena chuan Larsap-in State Information Commissioner atana Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte, IAS (Retd) a ruatna notification a chhiar chhuak hmasa a. Hemi hnu hian Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte, IAS (Retd.) chu rinawmna thutiam chham tirin Mizoram State Information Commissioner atan a lalut a ni.

He hunah hian Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama, EF&CC Minister Pu Lalthansanga, Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata, IPRP&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova leh mi pawimawh dangte an tel a ni.

Mizoram State Information Commissioner atana lakluh tak Dr. Lalzirmawia Chhangte, IAS (Retd) hi Tarpho, Hnathial District khaw chhuak niin, thiamna lamah B.A. (Hons. in Education) (NEHU 1986), LL.B (NEHU, 1993), M.A. (Public Administration) (HPU Shimla 2001), B.C.S (Serampore College, 2007), D.Min (Serampore College, 2018) leh Ph.D (Public Administration) (MZU, 2023) degree nei a ni.

May ni 30, 1991 khan Mizoram Civil Service zawmin, December ni 3, 2019 khan Indian Administrative Service (IAS) ah hlankai niin, AGMUT Cadre 2009 allotted a ni a. Serchhip District Bawrhsap dinhmun a chelh hnuah Mizoram Sawrkar hnuaia Department hrang hrangah Secretary dinhmun a chelh a. Commissioner-a a kaisan hnuah Excise & Narcotics Department-ah awmin hemi hnu hian Commerce & Industries Department-a Commissioner hna a chelh laiin August ni 31, 2025 khan superannuation pension-in a chhuak a ni. A service hun chhung hian DoPT Sponsored Foreign Training pawimawh tak takahte a kal tawh bawk a ni. A nupui fanaute nen PWD Tlang, Ramhlun Venglai, Aizawlah an cheng mek a ni.

Attachment

title: International Women’s Day, 2026 denchhenin hmeichhia harsatna tawk te tan District zawng zawngah public hearing neih tur
content:
4674/2025-2026

3rd March, 2026 :International Women’s Day denchhenin National Commission for Women, New Delhi leh State Commission for Women chuan India Ram pumah “Maha Jan Sunwai” a buatsaih dawn a.

International Women’s Day hi dt. 9thMarch, 2026 atanga 13thMarch, 2026 ah hman tur a ni. Aizawl leh District Headquarters zawng zawng ah he hun hi Mizoram State Commission for Women mai bakah District tina Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Legal Services Authority leh Women and Child Development ten an buatsaihho dawn bawk a ni.

Hmeichhia dikna chanvo rahbehna hrang hrang tuar te chuan he hunah hian complain a thehluh theih dawn a. Inchhungkhura hleilenna, eng kawng pawha tawk te, nupa kar harsatna avanga hmeichhe chunga tawrhna thleng te, hnathawhna hmuna thawhpui mipate atanga harsatna tawk te, chhaih nawmnah tawkte leh eng kawng pawha hmeichhia nihna avanga hleilenna leh nek chepna tawk tan harsatna a thlen theih ang.

Free Legal Public hearing neih tur a ni a, Complain hi theh luh theih ani dawn a, thehlut duh te chuan District tina District Programme Officer, WCD, Child Development Project Officer, WCD, Deputy Commissioner leh SP te hnen ah ziakin theh luh tur a ni. Complain theh lut te tan he mi ni hian a rang thei ang bera an harsatna te chinfel nghal tum a ni.

title: BAKTAWNG AH MADA FREE CLINIC NEIH A NI
content:
4673/2025-2026

March ni 3, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram AYUSH Doctors Association (MADA) chuan Baktawng khua-ah a thlawna hriselna inentirna (Free Medical Clinic) a buatsaih. Baktawng leh a chhehvel khuaa hriselna lama harsatna nei mi 200 vel zet an inentir a ni.

He Free Clinic ah hian AYUSH doctor 25 leh State Medicinal Plants Board (SMPB) leh MSACS aṭangin mi engemawzat an thawkchhuak a. Mipui hriselna an enfiah bakah a thlawnin damdawi an sem nghal a, thisen test chi hrang hrang a thlawn leh man tlawm zawkin damlo mamawh te tan tihsak bawk a ni.

Baktawng Village Council-in Free clinic buatsaih tute a lo dawngsawng a ni. Inentir hun hawn hma hian hriselna kawnga mipuite inzirtirna hun hman niin ramhmul damdawi chungchang zirtirna neih a ni bawk.

Mizoram AYUSH Doctors Association chuan hetiang ang mipui tana rawngbawlna hi hmun hla zawkahte pawh chhunzawm zel an tum thu an sawi a, Mizoram mipuite hriselna kawngah theihtawp chhuah zel an tum thu an tarlang a ni.

Attachment

title: AGRICULTURE LEH HORTICULTURE CLUSTER-TE TANA IRRIGATION SUPPORT CHUNGCHANGAH INTER-DEPARTMENTAL COORDINATION MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
4672/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 3rd March, 2026:Vawiin khan Secretariat Conference Hall, MINECO-ah Mizorama Agriculture leh Horticulture hmalaknaa Irrigation Support pek a nih theih dan chungchangah Inter-Departmental Coordination Meeting, Pu Lalrothanga, Secretary, Irrigation & Water Resources Department kaihhruaihna hnuaiah neih a ni a. Secretary, Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Department; Secretary, Horticulture Department; Chief Scientific Officer, MIRSAC leh department pathum te atangin officer pawimawhte an tel a. Secretary level-a hetianga inrawnkhawmna hi Mizoramah a vawi khatna nia hriat a ni.

Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Department leh Horticulture Department chuan Cluster-based Development leh Crop Planning lamah hma an sawn mek a. Hemi hmalakna tihchak nan hian Irrigation Support mumal tak neih a tulzia sawiho a ni a. Loneitute chawikan a, ramin hma a sawn zual zel theih nana department thawhho leh tanho a tulzia tarlan a ni.

He meeting-ah hian Agriculture leh Horticulture Department hmalak tawhna hmuna irrigation mamawhna te, irrigation facility siam tawhte nena tangho a thlai mamawh tawk tui pek theih dan leh hmasawnna kawng dangte sawiho a ni a. Micro-Irrigation, Lift Irrigation, Solar Irrigation, Spring-based System leh Water-use efficiency tihhmasawn dante pawh sawiho a ni.

GIS hmanga Spatial Planning leh Scientific Mapping kalpui theih nan, Mizoram Remote Sensing Applications Centre (MIRSAC) puihna hman theih dan pawh ngaihtuah a ni a. Buh leh bal, thlai tharna kawngah mumal zawka department-te thawhhona hian rah duhawm tak a chhuah zel beisei a ni.

title: World Hearing Day (Ri Hriatna Ni) hman a ni | Kum 2025-26 chhungin Mizoram-ah beng lama insawiselna nei mi 31,735 awm
content:
4671/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl the 3rd March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Ri Hriatna Ni (World Hearing Day) chu Mizoram-ah a vawi 11-na atan Directorate of Hospital & Medical Education Auditorium, MINECO-ah hman a ni a. He hunah hian Pi Vanlaldiki, Commissioner, Persons with Disabilities (PWD), Govt. of Mizoram chu khuallian niin, Dr. R. Lalchhuanawma, Mission Director, National Health Mission chuan hun a kaihhruai a ni.

Dr. Rita Zoramthari, MS ENT, Civil Hospital, Aizawl chuan kumin World Hearing Day thupui ‘From communities to classrooms: hearing care for all children’ (Khawtlang atanga naupangte thlengin: ri hriatna tha nei tura naupangte enkawl) tih hmangin thu sawina hun a nei.

World Hearing Day hi kum 2007 atang khan kum tin hman thin niin, vawiin hi khawvel pum huapa a vawi 19-na a ni a. Geneva Headquarter-in a rel angin he ni hian a tum ber chu ri hriatna thalote harsatna hriatthiam pui tur leh ri hriatna thalo titlem tura mipuite hnena zirtirna zau zawka theh darh a ni a. Hei bakah hian mipuite tana hriattur pawimawh chu beng natna a hma thei ang bera hmuh chhuaha, enkawl hma hian bengngawnna a thlen tur nasa takin a veng thei a ni tih a ni.

WHO-in a zirchianna ah ri hriatna thalo hi kan thil hriatna 5 (sensory organs) zinga piansualna-ah a tam ber a ni a. Tunah hian khawvel pum pui-ah mihring tluklehdingawn 1.5 (1.5 billion) vel hian ri hriatna chaklo an nei a, heng zinga maktaduai 430-te chu an beng a ngawng a, tun ang zela kan kal chho anih chuan kum 2050 ah chuan mihring 10 ah 1 zel hi an beng a ngawng dawna chhut a ni. Hetiang anih avang hian kan beng hi kan enkawl uluka, bengngawnna thlentu hrang hrang lakah kan inven fimkhur a ngai hle a. Beng natna chi hrang hrang bakah damdawi beng ri hriatna chaklo thlen thei lakah te leh ri bengchheng nasa lakah te kan inthiarfihlim a pawimawh hle a ni.

He mi kawnga hma la tur hian National Programme for Prevention and Control of Deafness (NPPCD) chu kum 2014, August thla atang khan Mizoramah pawh National Health Mission hnuaiah din tan a ni a. Kumin FY 2025-2026 (April 2025 – January 2026) thlenga chhinchhiah danin Mizoram chhungah beng lama insawiselna nei mi 31,735 lai en niin beng natna emaw beng ri hriatna thalo nei mi 4,750 hmuhchhuah tawh an ni a, mi 222 chu beng thalo vanga zai an ni tawhbawk. Hei bakah hian mi 1,541 chu bengdar dawng tur leh Speech Therapy tul ang te ti tura refer an ni a.

India ramah tunah hian NPPCD, Mizoram hi hma la tha ber pawl an ni mek a. Hemi kawngah hian RBSK (Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram), Ephatha Society te, Ephatha Special School for the Deaf and Hard of Hearing, College Veng leh Redeem Garden, Durtlang te thawhpui an ni a. Hei bakah hian NILD - NERC (National Institute for Locomotor Disorder - North Eastern Regional Council), ALIMCO leh AYJNISHD (D), Bhubaneshwar-te nen bengdar sem kawngah hian an thawkho mek bawk a ni. ALIMCO leh NPPCD tangkawp hian Zoram Medical College & Hospital, Falkawnah kumin FY2025-2026 (April - January) chhung khan a mawmawhtu te hnenah bengdar 108 lai semchhuah tawh a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: HULHLIAP SHORT STAY AFTER CARE SKILL DEVELOPMENT TRAINING KHARNA LEH CERTIFICATE SEMNA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
4670/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 3rd March, 2026:Vawiin khan MFM Skill Training Centre, Dawrpui Vengtharah Hulhliap Short Stay Centre chhuakte tana a thlawna Skill Training - Aluminium Fabrication leh Assistant Electrician closing function leh certificate semna hun hman a ni. Tun tumah hian Hulhliap SSC chhuak mi 14-te’n Assistant Electrician zir chhuakin, mi 21-te’n Aluminium Fabrication training an zo a ni.

Dr. R. Lalnunmawii, Joint Director (Rtd.), SW&TA & Member, Task Group on Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC in inkhawm a kaihruai a. Dr. Lalhmuchhuaka, Vice President, Indian Medical Association, Mizoram State Branch & Member, Task Group on Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC-in hunserh hmangin, khawvelah chetsual chang te, kal sual chang te awm mah se engtik lai pawha thil tha tihsak thintu, engkim ti thei Pathian an neih avangin, a kutah innghat a, amah rinchhana kawng zawh thar theuh turin training chhuakte a fuih a ni.

Pu Lalramchuanzela, Executive Director, MFM & Member, Task Group on Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC chuan report pein, tun tumah hian mi 35 hnenah Certificate sem chhuah a ni tih a tarlang a. Assistant Electrician hi January ni 28-a tan niin, Aluminium Fabrication hi February ni 17-a tan a ni a. Trainer-te, Pu Lalremruata (Electrician) leh Pu Malsawmliana (Aluminium Fabrication) te’n zirtirin, an training chhung hian Pu Lalrinmawia leh Pu Lalchhandama te’n Devotion hun an hmanpui thin thu a sawi a. He hunah hian training chhuakte chu taimakna leh teirei peihna an neih phawt chuan Mission Foundation Movement-in Japan rama a thawhpuite chuan Japan ramah Motor khalha thla khata nuai chuang hlawh thei tur thalai za chuang an mamawh thu leh thawn chho tura ngenna an rawn siam te tihlawhtling thei tura mahni invawng a, thahnemngai tak leh taima taka thawk zel turin a sawm a ni.

Pu Lalnunhlua, Additional Secretary, SW&WCD & Convener, Task Group on Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC chuan thu sawiin, duhthlanna hman sual avangin thlan ngai loh, duh loh kawng miin an zawh thin a, chu chuan nun hrehawm leh nuam lo zawk a thlen fo thin a; mahse chu mi karah pawh sawrkarin an inkhai chhuah leh theih nan theih tawp a chhuah a, hun tha buatsaihsak an ni chu tangkai taka hmang a, inthlahdah mai lo tur leh kawng hluia let tawh lo tura sawmin, certificate a sem nghal a ni.

Pi Vanlalhruaii, Member Secretary, Task Group on Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC in inkhawm kharna hun a hmang a ni. Tun thleng hian Hulhliap chhuak mi 118 hnenah certificate sem chhuah tawh a ni.

Attachment

title: FCS&CA MINISTER PU B.LALCHHANZOVA’N SAIRANG REL STATION-AH BUHFAI PHUR REL(TRAIN) A LO HMUAK THLENG
content:
4669/2025-2026

AIZAWL; the 3rdMarch, 2026:Tukin zing dar 7:00Am khan  FCS & CA Minister Pu B.Lalchhanzova chuan Sairang Rel Station-ah  buhfai quintal 25,901, Rel wagon 42-a  lo kal Rel(Train) a lo hmuak thleng. He buhfai phur Rel( Train) lo hmuahna programme tawi, Food Corporation of India (FCI), Divisional Office in a buatsaih-ah hian  Pu K.Vanlalvena, MP(RS)   pawhin  Chairman,State Consultative Committee of FCI a nihna angin a tel pui.

Tukin Sairang Rel station programme–ah hian thu sawiin, Supply Minister Pu B.Lalchhanzova chuan  Rel hmanga Sairang Rel Station a buhfai phurh thlena a lo awm ta hi Mizoram mipui tan thil chhinchhiah tlak tak nia  a hriatthu sawiin, kan hma lawka furpui lo thleng turah pawh a thlamuan sawt  thu a tarlang. Minister chuan  Mizoramin thla khata Buhfai kan mamawh zat  hi 97,000 quintals a ni a, 55,000 quintals hi FCI atanga kan dawn niin, 41,000 Qntls hi a thlawn a kan dawn a ni. A bak zawng hi Open Market Sale Scheme (OMSS)( Domestic) atanga 830/quintal a lei niin, buhfai quality tha zawk lei tuma hmalak chho mek a ni. Tunah chuan Aizawl,Lunglei leh Lawngtlai FCI Godown-a dah tur chu Sairang Rel Station-ah hian a lo thleng tawh dawn a. Bairabi Rel station-ah chuan Mizoram hmar lam Godown-a dah tur a thleng ve tawh thung dawn a ni, a ti.

Supply Minister chuan Sairang Rel station-a buhfai lo thleng tur chungchangah hian Sairang Dinthar Khawtlang hruaitute leh YMA te nen paw’n meeting an neih tawh thu sawiin, Buhfai hi chawlh ni (Sunday)-ah te, zing leh zanah te pawh a lo thlen hun a awm dawn a. Rel station atanga, Sairang Dinthar-a FCI Godown-a motor lianin a thiar a ngai dawn a. Chuvangin Sairang khawtlang nun pawh a tibuaina chin a awm dawn.Hemi kawngah hian Sairang mipuite dawhtheihna leh hriatthiamna pawh a ngen tak zet thu sawiin, Sairang mipuite harsatnaa hma lakpuitu tur Aizawl DC leh SP(Traffic)  te hnenah pawh lawmthu a sawi bawk. Minister hian FCI Divisional Office,Divisional Manager Pu Bankim Phonglo leh  a staff te leh  FCS&CA  official te chungah pawh lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Tukin programme-ah hian FCS&CA Minister hi Pi Teresy Vanlalhruaii, Secretary, FSCS&CA, Pu C.Zadailova, Addl.Director,FCS&CA te, FCI Divisional office-a  te leh official thenkhatin an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Governor Felicitates Mizoram NCC Cadets for Participation in National Level Camps
content:
532/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 3rd March, 2026:Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), today hosted a felicitation ceremony for 19 NCC cadets from the state who participated in various national level camps. The event was held this morning at Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Sports & Youth Services Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar and Lt Col Clement Lalhmingthanga (Retd), MLA also attended the programme.

Speaking at a felicitation ceremony, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh described the recent establishment of the newly raised NCC Group Headquarters in Aizawl as a landmark and highly encouraging step forward. He noted that, with this development, all NCC units across Mizoram are now functioning smoothly and efficiently under unified command. He voiced confidence that the strengthened institutional framework would attract greater participation from the state’s youth in the days ahead. The Governor specially commended the 19 NCC cadets from Mizoram who secured selection to various prestigious national-level camps following an intensely competitive and rigorous nationwide screening process. He described their achievement as a brilliant demonstration of dedication and excellence, stating that their place among the country’s top cadets serves as compelling evidence of their tireless effort, exemplary discipline, and resolute commitment.

Drawing from his personal experience, the Governor fondly recalled attending the inaugural NCC Advanced Leadership Camp in 1965. He shared with the cadets that the memories of such camps—the camaraderie built, the lessons learned, and the values absorbed—remain indelibly etched in one’s heart throughout life. “These formative experiences forge strong character and instil enduring leadership qualities that accompany you forever,” he said. He further described the privilege of marching on the Kartavya Path as one of the most cherished dreams and proudest honours cherished by every NCC cadet.

Looking ahead, the Governor conveyed his keen personal interest in the early introduction of a Naval Wing, which would serve as the third arm under the NCC Group Headquarters in Aizawl. He highlighted that Mizoram is well endowed with sufficient geographical space, motivated young people, and other essential resources to make this expansion viable and successful. He formally directed the Group Commander to pursue the proposal with vigour and secure its realisation at the earliest possible opportunity. The Governor expressed heartfelt gratitude to the parents, committed instructors, and NCC officers whose steadfast guidance, encouragement, and support had been instrumental in enabling the cadets to reach this level of accomplishment. In conclusion, he urged the felicitated cadets—and indeed all NCC members—to remain unwavering in their adherence to the core values of discipline, integrity, selfless service, and devoted loyalty to the nation.

During the event, the Governor and Chief Minister presented mementos and certificates to the NCC cadets who participated in the national level camps and interacted with them warmly, inquiring about their experiences.

In the recently concluded national level camps, Mizoram was represented by 19 cadets: 2 from 20 Mizo Bn. NCC, 1 from 1 Mizo Bn. NCC, 8 from 1 Mizo Air Sqn NCC, and 8 from 2 Mizo Bn. NCC. Among them, 4 cadets participated in the Republic Day Camp (RDC), 1 in the All India Thal Sainik Camp (AITSC), 5 in the All India Vayu Sainik Camp (AIVSC) and Air Force NCC Central Camp, and 9 in the Special National Integration Camp (SNIC).

The programme was also attended by Brig GS Arora, Group Commander, NCC Mizoram; other dignitaries; NCC officers and family members of the cadets.

Attachment

title: Larsap-in National Level Camp-a tel NCC Cadet-te lawmpuina buatsaih
content:
4668/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 3rd March, 2026:Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin chawhma khan Mizoram atanga National Level Camp-a tel National Cadet Corps (NCC) cadet 19 te lawmpuina hun Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan-ah a buatsaih. He hun hi Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Sports & Youth Services Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar leh Lt Col Clement Lalhmingthanga, MLA te'n an telpui a ni.

NCC Cadet-te lawmpuina programme-ah hian Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Mizoram NCC indin thar zelna kawngah hmasawnna thar a hmu chu phurawm a tih thu a sawi a. NCC Group HQ Aizawl hawn thar a ni leh hemi hnuaia Mizoram NCC Unit zawng zawngte tha taka kalpui a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, hemi avang hian thalai tam zawkin NCC an zawm belh ngei a beisei thu a sawi a. India ram NCC cadet sang chuang zingah fiahna hautak tak paltlanga national level camp-a tel thei cadet 19 lai Mizoramin a nei chu chhuanawm tiin, hei hian cadet-te taimakna, inthunun theihna leh tumruhna nasat zia a lantir a, fak pawh an phu hle a ni, a ti bawk.

Larsap chuan amah ngei pawhin kum 1965 ah NCC Advanced Leadership Camp hmasa ber a lo chhim tawh tih sawiin, camp leh Kartavya Path vela chet tlatnate chu dam chhunga an hriat reng dawn thu leh, hruaitu tha ni tura a puih dawn thu a sawi a. NCC Group HQ Aizawl hnuaiah 3rd wing ni turin Naval Wing din a duh thu sawiin, a hlawhtlin thuai theih nan Group Commander chu chak taka hma la turin a chah a. NCC cadet-te hlawhtlinna phena mi tangkai nu leh pa, zirtirtu leh NCC officer-te kaihhruaina leh fuihnate chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin, NCC cadet-te chu duh tawk mai lova tun aia nasa zawka tan la turin a fuih a. Mahni inthununna, rinawmna, tlawmngaihnate chhawmnung chung zela ram tana theihtawp chhuah tum turin a fuih bawk.

He hunah hian Larsap leh Chief Minister-te hian National Level Camp-a tel NCC Cadet-te hnenah chawimawina thilpek an hlan bakah an tawnhriatte zawtin an kawm bawk.

Tunhnai NCC national level camp neih zawh takah khan Mizoram atangin NCC cadet 19 an tel a. 20 Mizo Bn. NCC atangin cadet 2, 1 Mizo Bn. NCC atangin cadet 1, 1 Mizo Air Sqn NCC atangin cadet 8 leh 2 Mizo Bn. NCC atangin cadet 8 te an tel a. Heng zinga cadet 4 te hi Republic Day Camp (RDC) ah telin, cadet 1 All India Thal Sainik Camp (AITSC) ah a tel a, cadet 5 te All India Vayu Sainik Camp (AIVSC), Air Force NCC central Camp-ah telin, cadet 9 te Special National Integration Camp (SNIC) ah an tel a ni.

He hunah hian Brig GS Arora, Group Commander, NCC Mizoram, sawm bik official dangte, NCC Officer-te leh Cadet tawiawmtu an chhungte an tel a ni.
